---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(broom)

#read data with summarized performance above average
data_paa <- readRDS("data_paa.rds")
```

```{r}
#select included data parameters
paa_param <- c("augmentation",
               "architecture", 
               "epochs", 
               "learning_rate", 
               "Classification.level",
               "num_class", 
               "num_img", 
               "curation", 
               "PAA",
               "id")

#select included numerical data parameters
paa_param_num <- c("epochs", 
                   "learning_rate", 
                   "num_class", 
                   "num_img", 
                   "PAA")

#convert categorical values to factors
#filter for only rows with all parameter values filled
#remove unnecessary columns
data_paa_param <- data_paa %>% 
  mutate(architecture = as.factor(architecture),
         curation = as.factor(curation)) %>% 
  filter(if_all(all_of(paa_param), 
                ~ !is.na(.))) %>% 
  select(-author, 
         -journal, 
         -year, 
         -citations)
```

```{r}
#ensures model is not fit unless data is complete (i.e. checks work of above)
options(na.action = "na.fail")

#fit m1, all parameters
m1 <- lmer(PAA ~ scale(num_img) + scale(num_class) + scale(epochs) + scale(learning_rate) + curation + augmentation + Classification.level + (1 | architecture) + (1 | id), 
           data = data_paa_param)
summary(m1)

data_aug_mean <- data_paa_param %>% 
  group_by(augmentation) %>% 
  summarise(mean_num_img = mean(num_img), na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(data_aug_mean, 
       aes(x = augmentation,
           y = mean_num_img))+
  geom_col()

#dredging m1
m1_dredge <- dredge(m1)
m1_dredge

#fit m2 based on dredge results
m2 <- lmer(PAA ~  curation + scale(num_img) + (1 | architecture) + (1 | id), 
           data = data_paa_param)
summary(m2)

#fit m3 with interaction between scaled image number and augmentation
m3 <- lmer(PAA ~ scale(num_img) * augmentation + scale(num_class) + scale(epochs) * scale(learning_rate) + curation + Classification.level + (1 | architecture) + (1 | id),
               data = data_paa_param)
summary(m3)

#dredging m3
m3_dredge <- dredge(m3)
m3_dredge #0 delta AIC shows the same factors as m2

#comparison information statistics between m1 m2 and m3
AICc(m1, m2, m3, k = 2)
```

```{r}
data_plot_m2 <- data_paa_param %>%
  mutate(
    predicted = predict(m2),
    observed  = PAA)

ggplot(data_plot_m2, 
       aes(x = observed, 
           y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, 
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, 
              intercept = 0, 
              linetype = "solid") +
  labs(x = "Observed PAA",
       y = "Predicted PAA",
       title = "Predicted vs Observed Values for m2") +
  theme_classic()

data_plot_m1a <- data_paa_param %>% 
  mutate(predicted = predict(m1a),
         observed = PAA)

ggplot(data_plot_m1a, 
       aes(x = observed, 
           y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, 
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, 
              intercept = 0, 
              linetype = "solid") +
  labs(x = "Observed PAA",
       y = "Predicted PAA",
       title = "Predicted vs Observed Values for m2") +
  theme_classic()

data_plot2 <- data_paa_param %>%
  mutate(fitted = fitted(m2),
         resid  = resid(m2))

ggplot(data_plot2, 
       aes(x = fitted, 
           y = resid)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, 
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, 
             linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Fitted values",
       y = "Residuals",
       title = "Residuals vs Fitted for m2") +
  theme_classic()
```
